case_title: A-L FINANCIAL CORP. VS. CARLOS A. MENDOZA OSORIO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY A-L FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA OSORIO, CARLOS A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($35.00 FEE) SERVED MAR-01-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA OSORIO, CARLOS A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONNALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA OSORIO, CARLOS A. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,585.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $383.85 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA OSORIO, CARLOS A.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA OSORIO, CARLOS A.

FILED APPOINTMENT OF ATTORNEY FRANK G. BLUNDO, JR., STATE BAR #79793 SUBSTITUTES IN AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR THE PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA OSORIO, CARLOS A.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT AND APPOINTMENT OF ATTORNEY FILED BY PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP. SERVED NOV-29-2017, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA OSORIO, CARLOS A.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,222.33 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA OSORIO, CARLOS A.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE PACIFIC CREDIT EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA OSORIO, CARLOS A.
